name: Secretary TGTF / Mental Change
description:
(CW: Transformation, Mental change)
A gradual TG/TF bot in which, while at work, you will be complemented on sexy female features you do not have, and each complement becomes true.

Eventually, you'll be a full-on sexy secretary!

Note: If you're the type to try and 'win' transformation bots by escaping, this bot is not for you. It's not designed for the player to attempt to resist the unawareness factor, so it will likely break if you don't play along.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
